# coolify_github_app (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Coolify GitHub App integration by its numeric ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a GitHub App by its numeric ID.
data "coolify_github_app" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "github_app_uuid" {
  value = data.coolify_github_app.example.uuid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric identifier of the GitHub App.

### Read-Only

- `app_id` (Number) The GitHub App ID.
- `client_id` (String) The GitHub App client ID.
- `installation_id` (Number) The GitHub App installation ID.
- `name` (String) The name of the GitHub App.
- `organization_name` (String) The GitHub organization name.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the GitHub App.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) The GitHub App webhook secret.
